summary: Completed testing of iteration 8 features: Atatürk image on Home page, Turkish flag with waving animation, 'Hatırla Beni' (Remember Me) checkbox on Operator and Plan login pages, and Warehouse login data-testid attributes. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Home Page: Atatürk image visible in top-left corner (data-testid='ataturk-image')
Home Page: Turkish flag visible in top-right corner (data-testid='turkish-flag')
Home Page: Turkish flag has waving animation (SVG with animate elements)
Home Page: Theme toggle button visible next to flag (data-testid='theme-toggle')
Home Page: All 6 module cards present (management, plan, operator, warehouse, paint, driver)
Home Page Navigation: /management route works
Home Page Navigation: /plan route works
Home Page Navigation: /operator route works
Home Page Navigation: /warehouse route works
Home Page Navigation: /paint route works
Home Page Navigation: /driver route works
Operator Login: 'Hatırla Beni' checkbox visible (data-testid='operator-remember-me')
Operator Login: Login with ali/134679 works correctly
Operator Login: Credentials saved to localStorage as 'operator_remember' when checkbox checked
Operator Login: Credentials pre-filled from localStorage on return visit
Operator Login: Remember Me checkbox auto-checked when credentials exist in localStorage
Plan Login: 'Hatırla Beni' checkbox visible (data-testid='plan-remember-me')
Plan Login: Login with emrecan/testtest12 works correctly
Plan Login: Credentials saved to localStorage as 'plan_remember' when checkbox checked
Plan Login: Credentials pre-filled from localStorage on return visit
Plan Login: Remember Me checkbox auto-checked when credentials exist in localStorage
Warehouse Login: data-testid='warehouse-username-input' present and visible
Warehouse Login: data-testid='warehouse-password-input' present and visible
Warehouse Login: data-testid='warehouse-login-button' present and visible
Warehouse Login: Login with depo1/depo123 works correctly

ataturk_image.implementation: Atatürk portrait in top-left corner with rounded border, shadow, and fade-in animation

turkish_flag.implementation: WavingFlag SVG component with animate elements for waving effect, positioned in top-right corner

operator_remember_me.implementation: rememberMe state, useEffect to load from localStorage on mount, saves to 'operator_remember' key on login

plan_remember_me.implementation: rememberMe state, useEffect to load from localStorage on mount, saves to 'plan_remember' key on login

warehouse_data_testids.implementation: data-testid attributes added to username input, password input, and login button

seed_data_creation: No seed data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 features verified: 1) Atatürk image in top-left corner of Home page with data-testid='ataturk-image', 2) Turkish flag SVG with waving animation in top-right corner with data-testid='turkish-flag', 3) Theme toggle button next to flag with data-testid='theme-toggle', 4) Operator login 'Hatırla Beni' checkbox saves credentials to localStorage key 'operator_remember' and pre-fills on return, 5) Plan login 'Hatırla Beni' checkbox saves credentials to localStorage key 'plan_remember' and pre-fills on return, 6) Warehouse login form has data-testid attributes on all inputs and button. All 6 module cards navigate correctly.
